en: I bet there is drugs in boxing.
ko: 복싱에 약물이 있을 거야. 머리 맞으면 파라세타몰 먹어야 하잖아.

en: I'm sure you've got to take paracetamol after all those bashes on the head.
ko: 복싱에 약물이 있을 거야. 머리 맞으면 파라세타몰 먹어야 하잖아.

en: Do you get a headache? To be honest, it would be a hard sport to cheat in.
ko: 두통이 와? 솔직히 속임수 쓰기 어려운 스포츠야.

en: You could have all the energy in the world for boxing, but if you haven't got the technique and the skill to go with it,
ko: 에너지가 아무리 넘쳐도 기술과 스킬이 없으면 이길 수 없어.

en: you know, you still can't win. Right. I think if you took enough heroin...
ko: 헤로인을 충분히 하면 신경 안 쓰겠지.

en: LAUGHTER ..you wouldn't be bothered about it. Nick, are you a professional sportsman or drug taker?
One of the two. Fuck off. LAUGHTER
I respect him even more now that I know that he was doing drugs for seven years.
ko: 그가 7년 동안 약을 했다는 걸 알고 나서 더 존경하게 됐어.

en: I did drugs once and I couldn't leave my bedroom for a week.
I barely had the energy to get up and piss in the Coke bottle in the corner of my room.
ko: 방 구석에 있는 콜라 병에 소변 보러 일어날 힘도 겨우 있었어.
